name: Non-owner profiles can switch into owner context
description: Privilege-escalation ACL gap (DeepSec DS-212). A non-owner profile (child on a parent's account) can switch into the owner profile and thereby unlock isOwner-gated content (Billing, Account Security, Export/Delete, Add-child). ROOT CAUSE: no owner-elevation gate exists on EITHER side. Client: profiles.tsx:185-206 handleProfileTap only special-cases owner->child (L186); every other combination, incl. non-owner->owner, falls through to handleSwitch (L205) ungated (the [BUG-133] comment at L104-115 deliberately defers all authz to the server). Server: POST /v1/profiles/switch (routes/profiles.ts:415-442) checks ONLY account-membership (L423-434, intentionally no isOwner check per CR-2026-05-19-H1) and returns 200 for any same-account switch. The capture note's 'only prompts when active=owner & target=child' misread the owner->child navigation branch, which is not a security prompt. THREE ungated surfaces / one root cause: (1) UI owner-row tap; (2) lib/profile.ts switchProfile() primitive; (3) direct POST /v1/profiles/switch with a child JWT -- a client-only fix CANNOT close (3); fix must be server-side. Needs own spec + plan; remediation hinges on the product decision recorded in the WI comment.
acceptanceCriteria: Done (outcome level): a non-owner profile cannot enter owner context without a fresh credential re-verification. Server POST /v1/profiles/switch rejects a non-owner->owner switch with 403 OWNER_ELEVATION_REQUIRED unless the caller recently re-verified, keyed on the Clerk fva (factor-verification-age) claim (NOT JWT iat, which Clerk's ~60s refresh keeps fresh); behind a kill-switch flag mirroring ADULT_OWNER_GATE_ENABLED. Client intercepts the non-owner tap and runs the existing useReverification step-up (already in prod: change-email.tsx, add-password.tsx), retrying the switch on success. Regression coverage: API negative-path test (child JWT -> owner switch -> 403) AND positive (fresh fva -> 200); the existing profiles.test.tsx:271 test asserting an immediate child->owner switch is INVERTED (not deleted) to assert the gate. Approach + the product decision are recorded in a spec (docs/specs) + an implementation plan (docs/plans) BEFORE execution.
riskImpact: HIGH severity, high confidence (DeepSec DS-212). Privilege escalation: any non-owner profile on a shared account reaches owner-only Billing / Account-Security / Export-Delete / Add-child. Gate is account-scoped only on both client and server; the direct-API surface (variant 3) is unreachable by any client-side fix.
bodyText:
Brief
Profile switching only prompts when the active profile is the owner and the target is a child. In every other case, including a non-owner child tapping the owner row, the screen immediately calls switchProfile(profile.id). The traced server endpoint only checks same-account ownership, so after the switch the API client sends the owner profile id and server-derived profileMeta.isOwner becomes true. That bypasses profile/parent-proxy boundaries and exposes owner-only account actions to a non-owner profile. The Add profile action is also shown without an owner-role check.
Recommended remediation
Enforce profile-switch authorization server-side using the current active profile and role, not just account ownership. Non-owner profiles should only switch to themselves unless a parent reauth/PIN or equivalent owner proof succeeds. Hide or disable owner rows and add-profile actions for non-owner profiles, and keep this route behind the same app/consent gates as the rest of authenticated UI.
DeepSec finding
Finding ID: DS-212
Scan run: 20260516050543-3902c61be7bd5834 (2026-05-16, deepsec process / gpt-5.5)
File: apps/mobile/src/app/profiles.tsx — lines 48, 145, 179, 180, 186, 305
Vulnerability class: acl-check
Severity: HIGH · Confidence: high
Notes
Captured from the DeepSec scan artefact .deepsec/data/eduagent-build/reports/report.json. Part of bundle WI-76 (WP-ACL). Acceptance Criteria and Execution Path are set during triage/refinement.
